member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PaymentDetail
member.summary: Shared data transfer object representing a single bank transaction detail. Passed to bank direct-credit generators.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PaymentDetail.#ctor(System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Decimal,System.String,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.String,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shared data transfer object representing a single bank transaction detail. Passed to bank direct-credit generators.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest
member.summary: Descriptor representing a pluggable module's metadata, capability parameters, and compatibility requirements.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.PluginId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique plugin identifier.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.PluginName
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the plugin.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.Provider
member.summary: Gets or sets the developer or provider entity name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.Version
member.summary: Gets or sets the plugin assembly version.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of plugin features.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.MinEngineVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimal platform calculation engine version required.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.EffectiveFrom
member.summary: Gets or sets the date the plugin layout becomes active.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.EffectiveTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the date the plugin layout ceases to be active (nullable).

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PluginManifest.SupportedCapabilities
member.summary: Gets or sets the capabilities registry keys supported by this plugin (e.g., specific bank codes or report names).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.ValidationIssue
member.summary: Represents a validation warning or error produced during compliance auditing operations.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.ValidationIssue.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a validation warning or error produced during compliance auditing operations.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.VersionContract
member.summary: Immutable version contract representing pinned versions of different calculation engines and legislative rules. Ensures that historical payroll cycles are reproducible.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.VersionContract.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Immutable version contract representing pinned versions of different calculation engines and legislative rules. Ensures that historical payroll cycles are reproducible.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IBankFileGenerator
member.summary: Defines the plugin extension boundary for implementing direct-credit clearing file layouts in Fiji.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IBankFileGenerator.BankCode
member.summary: Gets the unique bank code (e.g. "BSP", "ANZ", "WBC").

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IBankFileGenerator.BankName
member.summary: Gets the user-friendly bank name.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IBankFileGenerator.Generate(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PaymentDetail},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Char)
member.summary: Formats the direct-credit dataset into a structured file output.
member.param: The employer's credit source account number.
The employer's bank BSB code (optional/required by bank).
The sequence of employee payment details.
Format string template for the file header.
Format string template for each detail row.
Format string template for the file trailer.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IComplianceFileService.GenerateFrcsCsv(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PaymentDetail},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Builds the comma-separated data lines for the FRCS Monthly Employer Return (MER).
member.param: Sequence of employee payment records containing gross, allowances, and PAYE.
member.returns: UTF-8 formatted comma-separated content block without headers.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IComplianceFileService.GenerateFnpfCsv(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.SDK.Contracts.PaymentDetail})
member.summary: Builds the comma-separated contribution columns for the FNPF remittance portal.
member.param: Sequence of employee payment records containing employee/employer contribution amounts.
member.returns: UTF-8 formatted CSV block with FNPF header columns.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IComplianceValidator
member.summary: Interface for legislative or bank rules validation engines.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IComplianceValidator.RuleCode
member.summary: Gets the unique registry rule identifier code.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IComplianceValidator.RuleName
member.summary: Gets the display name of the validation check.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IComplianceValidator.Validate(System.Int32,System.Object)
member.summary: Evaluates the target context payload and returns a list of validation issues.
member.param: The target model or dataset to validate.
member.returns: Sequence of validation warnings or errors.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IExportProvider
member.summary: Defines the contract for exporting tabular datasets to Excel spreadsheets using ClosedXML.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IExportProvider.ExportExcelAsync(System.Data.DataSet,System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports a DataSet to an Excel sheet stream.
member.param: The target output stream to write the Excel file.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IImportProvider
member.summary: Defines the contract for importing tabular data from Excel spreadsheets using ClosedXML.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IImportProvider.ImportExcelAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reads an Excel sheet and converts it into a DataSet.
member.param: The input file stream containing the spreadsheet.
member.returns: A DataSet containing the worksheet data.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.ILicenseProvider
member.summary: Defines the contract for validating company licenses using RSA signatures.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.ILicenseProvider.ValidateLicenseAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Validates the license signature against a public key.
member.param: The serialized license XML string containing the signature.
The RSA public key in PEM format used for validation.
member.returns: True if the license signature is valid; otherwise false.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.INotificationService
member.summary: Interface defining alert transmission methods across notification channels (Email, Teams, Slack, Webhooks, etc.).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.INotificationService.SendAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Dispatches an alert asynchronously.
member.param: The recipient address, phone number, or webhook URL.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IReportProvider
member.summary: Defines the integration gateway for paginated reporting services (such as SQL Server Reporting Services).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IReportProvider.RenderReportAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Renders a template report with parameter variables.
member.param: The name or path of the report layout definition.
Filter parameters passed to query scopes.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IRuleProvider
member.summary: Defines the contract for fetching dynamic statutory rules and rates (e.g. FNPF rates, PAYE brackets).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IRuleProvider.GetRuleValueAsync(System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a statutory rule value as a string.
member.param: The effective date for checking the rule value.
member.returns: Dynamic rule value as a string.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.SDK.Interfaces.IRuleProvider.GetDecimalRuleValueAsync(System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.Decimal,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a statutory rule value parsed as a decimal.
member.param: The effective date for checking the rule value.
The fallback value if the rule is not found or parsing fails.
member.returns: Dynamic rule value parsed as a decimal, or the default value.
